name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {Idle, Trying, Critical}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] \in {Idle, Trying, Critical}

(* Initial state: all processes idle *)
Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> Idle]

(* Transition relation *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N:
    \/ /\ state[i] = Idle
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Trying]
    \/ /\ state[i] = Trying
       /\ \A j \in 1..N: j # i => state[j] # Critical
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Critical]
    \/ /\ state[i] = Critical
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Idle]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, state, votes, decision

(* State of each participant: "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
Init == participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"] /\ state = participants /\ votes = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE] /\ decision = "None"

Prepare(i) == state[i] = "Init" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Prepared"]

VoteYes(i) == state[i] = "Prepared" /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]

VoteNo(i) == state[i] = "Prepared" /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Commit(i) == state[i] = "Prepared" /\ \A j \in 1..N: votes[j] = TRUE /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Committed"]

Abort(i) == state[i] = "Prepared" /\ \E j \in 1..N: votes[j] = FALSE /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"]

Decision == decision = "Committed" \/ decision = "Aborted"

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: Prepare(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: VoteYes(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: VoteNo(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: Commit(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: Abort(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, state, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if fork i is free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* philosopher i picks up forks *)
       state[i] = "thinking" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[If(i = N, 1, i+1)] = 0
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![If(i = N, 1, i+1)] = 1]
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ (* philosopher i starts eating *)
       state[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 1 /\ forks[If(i = N, 1, i+1)] = 1
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ (* philosopher i puts down forks *)
       state[i] = "eating" /\ forks[i] = 1 /\ forks[If(i = N, 1, i+1)] = 1
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![If(i = N, 1, i+1)] = 0]
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* Number of servers, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)
States == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Server i starts election *)
       /\ state[i] = "Follower"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
       /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
    \/ (* Server i votes for candidate j *)
       /\ state[i] = "Follower"
       /\ \E j \in 1..N : j # i
       /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = j]
    \/ (* Server i becomes leader *)
       /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
       /\ \E j \in 1..N : j # i
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers - 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Proc, Chan

VARIABLES state, channel, marker, recorded

(* state[p] is the local state of process p *)
(* channel[c] is the sequence of messages in channel c *)
(* marker[c] is TRUE if a marker has been sent on channel c *)
(* recorded[p] is TRUE if process p has recorded its state *)

Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ marker = [c \in Chan |-> FALSE]
        /\ recorded = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]

Send(p, q, m) == 
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], m)
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, recorded>>

Recv(p, q) ==
  /\ channel[(q, p)] # <<>>
  /\ channel'[(q, p)] = Tail(channel[(q, p)])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, recorded>>

SendMarker(p, q) ==
  /\ marker'[(p, q)] = TRUE
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], "marker")
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded>>

RecordState(p) ==
  /\ recorded'[p] = TRUE
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = state[p] + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker, recorded>>

Next ==
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc : Send(p, q, 1)
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc : Recv(p, q)
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc : SendMarker(p, q)
  \/ \E p \in Proc : RecordState(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker, recorded>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_token

name: Simple Key-Value Store

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

VARIABLES ballots, promises, accepts, chosen

(* ballots[p] = current ballot number of proposer p *)
(* promises[a] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> v] last promise of acceptor a *)
(* accepts[a] = [maxBallot |-> b, value |-> v] last accepted value of acceptor a *)
(* chosen = [value |-> v] if a value has been chosen *)

Init == ballots = [p \in 1..M |-> 0] /\
          promises = [a \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot |-> 0, maxValue |-> NULL]] /\
          accepts = [a \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]] /\
          chosen = [value |-> NULL]

Prepare(p, b) == /\ ballots[p] = b
                 /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = b]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<promises, accepts, chosen>>

Promise(a, p, b) ==
  LET last == promises[a] IN
  /\ last.maxBallot <= b
  /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> last.maxValue]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, accepts, chosen>>

Accept(a, p, b, v) ==
  LET last == accepts[a] IN
  /\ last.maxBallot <= b
  /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = [maxBallot |-> b, value |-> v]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, chosen>>

Chosen(v) ==
  /\ chosen.value = v
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, accepts>>

Next ==
  \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..100 : (* ballot numbers bounded for simplicity *)
    \E a \in 1..N: Prepare(p, b) /\ Promise(a, p, b) \/
    \E a \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Accept(a, p, b, v) \/
    Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballots, promises, accepts, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES state, chunk, retransmits, lost

TypeOK == state \in {"idle", "sending", "done"} /\ chunk \in 0..Len(File) /\ retransmits \in 0..MAX_RETRIES /\ lost \in BOOLEAN

Init == /\ state = "idle"
        /\ chunk = 0
        /\ retransmits = 0
        /\ lost = FALSE

SendChunk == /\ state = "sending"
             /\ chunk < Len(File)
             /\ chunk' = chunk + 1
             /\ retransmits' = 0
             /\ lost' = FALSE
             /\ state' = "sending"

Retransmit == /\ state = "sending"
              /\ retransmits < MAX_RETRIES
              /\ retransmits' = retransmits + 1
              /\ lost' = FALSE
              /\ state' = "sending"

GiveUp == /\ state = "sending"
          /\ retransmits = MAX_RETRIES
          /\ state' = "done"

Next == \E action \in {SendChunk, Retransmit, GiveUp} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, chunk, retransmits, lost>>

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Txns, Keys, Values

VARIABLES db, active, pending, committed, aborted, snapshot

Init ==
    /\ db = [k \in Keys |-> 0]
    /\ active = {}
    /\ pending = {}
    /\ committed = {}
    /\ aborted = {}
    /\ snapshot = [t \in Txns |-> [k \in Keys |-> 0]]

TypeOK ==
    /\ db \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ active \subseteq Txns
    /\ pending \subseteq Txns
    /\ committed \subseteq Txns
    /\ aborted \subseteq Txns
    /\ snapshot \in [Txns -> [Keys -> Values]]

    /\ t \notin active
    /\ active' = active \cup {t}
    /\ pending' = pending \cup {t}
    /\ committed' = committed
    /\ aborted' = aborted
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ db' = db

Read(t, k) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ snapshot[t][k]

Write(t, k, v) ==
    /\ t \in pending
    /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = v]
    /\ active' = active
    /\ pending' = pending
    /\ committed' = committed
    /\ aborted' = aborted
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot

Commit(t) ==
    /\ t \in pending
    /\ pending' = pending \ {t}
    /\ committed' = committed \cup {t}
    /\ active' = active \ {t}
    /\ aborted' = aborted
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ db' = db

Abort(t) ==
    /\ t \in pending
    /\ pending' = pending \ {t}
    /\ aborted' = aborted \cup {t}
    /\ active' = active \ {t}
    /\ committed' = committed
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ db' = db

Next ==
    \/ \E t \in Txns: Begin(t)
    \/ \E t \in Txns : \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Write(t, k, v)
    \/ \E t \in Txns: Commit(t)
    \/ \E t \in Txns: Abort(t)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, active, pending, committed, aborted, snapshot>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks[i] = 0

Next == /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + \SUM(j \in 1..N)(clocks[j]) \div N) + DRIFT(i)]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Proc

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 0

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE known, infected

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup {j \in 1..N : infected[j]}]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \E c \in Clients :
          \/ /\ free # {}
             /\ p \in free
             /\ free' = free \ {p}
             /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
          \/ /\ free = {}
             /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Subscribers, Topics

VARIABLES subs, msgs

(* subs: [topic -> SUBSCRIBERS] maps each topic to the set of subscribers interested in it *)
(* msgs: [topic -> SEQUENCE[message]] maps each topic to the sequence of messages posted on it *)

Init ==
  /\ subs = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
  /\ msgs = [t \in Topics |-> <<>>]

Register(sub, topic) ==
  /\ sub \in Subscribers
  /\ topic \in Topics
  /\ subs'[topic] = subs[topic] \cup {sub}
  /\ msgs' = msgs

Post(sub, topic, msg) ==
  /\ sub \in Subscribers
  /\ topic \in Topics
  /\ msgs' = [msgs EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(msgs[topic], msg)]
  /\ UNCHANGED subs

Deliver(sub, topic) ==
  /\ sub \in subs[topic]
  /\ msgs[topic] # <<>>
  /\ UNCHANGED subs
  /\ msgs' = [msgs EXCEPT ![topic] = Tail(msgs[topic])]

Next ==
  \E sub \in Subscribers : \E topic \in Topics : \E msg \in {"msg1", "msg2", "msg3"} :
    Register(sub, topic) \/ Post(sub, topic, msg) \/ Deliver(sub, topic)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subs, msgs>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants
       \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
       \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
       \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in 0..1
          /\ wants \in {<<FALSE, FALSE>>, <<TRUE, FALSE>>, <<FALSE, TRUE>>, <<TRUE, TRUE>>}

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == \E n \in Node : \E delta \in [Node -> Nat] :
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [counts[n] EXCEPT ![m] = counts[n][m] + delta[m]]]
  /\ \A m \in Node : delta[m] >= 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts
